title: HEALTH CENTER SERVICES - 211info
text: CASCADIA WOODLAND PARK HEALTH CENTER HEALTH CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health counseling for families, primary care, and substance use disorder (SUD) services, including Adult Outpatient/Recovery day services. 10373 NE Hancock Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-6pm, Friday 8:30am-5pm Intake Phone Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 253-6754 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 253-6754 Intake (503) 674-7777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 22, 24, 77, and 87 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Family Counseling General Medical Care Group Counseling Individual Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADIA WOODLAND PARK HEALTH CENTER
